ApexClass.description: @AuraEnabled controller for all LWC interactions with scan jobs. Enforces FLS and CRUD via USER_MODE. Delegates all business logic to services - no SOQL or DML directly. Must NOT be called from async contexts (Batch, Future, Queueable). Exposes: createJob(), getJobStatus(), getNodeHierarchy(), cancelJob(), resumeJob(), getObjectList(), getComponentCount(), isCopilotEnabled().
